name: Trauma Assessment Intake
description: Trauma assessment intake for licensed mental health professionals conducting an initial trauma assessment. Evaluates the trauma history, current PTSD symptoms across the four DSM-5 clusters, functional impairment, safety, and comorbid conditions to produce a trauma assessment profile with symptom profile and clinical considerations for the treating provider. Not clinical advice. Requires trauma-informed approach throughout.

privacy.disclosure: A summary of this session will be available for review.
